text:
Market today: Geopolitical tensions and rising Treasury yields are the main drivers, pushing oil prices up and creating uncertainty. This macro backdrop can impact tech names, especially leveraged ones like yours.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down 35% and marked for attention. SPAL is also down significantly (-34%) and needs a close eye. QQQI is slightly down but holding steady.

Watch: Keep an eye on oil prices and Treasury yields for broader market sentiment.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and watching for macro shifts.
plays: SOXL: This is a SELL/TRIM. The 35% loss and leveraged nature are high risk, especially on margin. Re-evaluate your position.
SPAL: This is a SELL/TRIM. Similar to SOXL, the 34% loss and leveraged nature require attention. Consider trimming.
Consider TECS: Scanner shows a WATCH with entry 7.02-7.01, stop 6.98. This is a bearish semiconductor ETF and could be a hedge if your chip exposure continues to fall.
